Descriptions.Name: Name
Descriptions.Efficiency:
Efficiency: 
((Points + Rebounds + Assists + Steals + Blocks) - 
((Field Goals Att. - Field Goals Made) + 
(Free Throws Att. - Free Throws Made) + Turnovers))
Descriptions.UsagePercentage:
Usage Percentage: The percentage of team plays used by a player. 
(FGA + (0.44 * FTA) + TO) / POSS
